body:
closes #136 

This PR adds functionality for writing diagnostics in pressure coordinates via a new z sampling method called `RealPressureLevelsMethod`. The struct is used to store the pressure interpolator from ClimaCore (see https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCore.jl/pull/2422) and scratch fields to prevent allocations. The `compute_field` functions dispatch off of `z_sampling_method` to determine whether the field should be computed on z levels or pressure levels. After `compute_field` is called, the rest of the code works with the exception of dealing with the pressure space.

TODO

- [x] Rebase
title: Add diagnostics in pressure coordinates
